description: Bump all outdated dependencies in the root monorepo and platform packages to their latest versions. This covers pinned exact-version bumps (biome), semver-range bumps (lucide-react), major version bumps (lefthook 1.x→2.x), and running npm update + npm install to resolve all in-range patches and fix the open@10 lockfile conflict.

userStories.title: Bump @biomejs/biome from 2.4.5 to 2.4.6 in root package.json
userStories.description: Update the pinned exact version of @biomejs/biome in the root package.json from 2.4.5 to 2.4.6.
userStories.notes:
Files:
- package.json (change biome version)

Context:
Biome is pinned as an exact version (no ^ prefix) in root devDependencies. The current value is `"@biomejs/biome": "2.4.5"` on line 51.

Changes:
Change `"@biomejs/biome": "2.4.5"` to `"@biomejs/biome": "2.4.6"` in package.json.
Then run `npm install` to update the lockfile.

Constraints:
- Do NOT add a ^ prefix — this package is intentionally pinned to an exact version.
- Do NOT change biome in any plugin package.json — those are standalone packages handled separately.

userStories.title: Bump lefthook from ^1.11.13 to ^2.1.3
userStories.description: Bump lefthook to v2.x in root package.json. The lefthook.yml config format is compatible with v2.
acceptanceCriteria: lefthook.yml is unchanged (config is v2-compatible already)
userStories.notes:
Files:
- package.json (change lefthook version range)

Context:
Lefthook v2 is a major version bump. The current range is `"lefthook": "^1.11.13"` on line 65 of package.json. The existing lefthook.yml uses standard YAML format with pre-commit and pre-push commands — this format is fully compatible with lefthook v2.

Changes:
Change `"lefthook": "^1.11.13"` to `"lefthook": "^2.1.3"` in package.json.
Run `npm install` to update the lockfile.

Constraints:
- Do NOT modify lefthook.yml — the config is already v2-compatible.
- The prepare script `"prepare": "lefthook install"` on line 45 does not need changes.

userStories.title: Bump lucide-react from ^0.575.0 to ^0.577.0 in browser-extension and plugin-sdk
userStories.description: Bump the lucide-react version range in browser-extension and plugin-sdk. Since lucide-react is 0.x, semver treats minor bumps as breaking, so ^0.575.0 will not resolve to 0.577.0.
userStories.notes:
Files:
- platform/browser-extension/package.json (line 50: `"lucide-react": "^0.575.0"`)
- platform/plugin-sdk/package.json (line 31: `"lucide-react": "^0.575.0"`)

Context:
lucide-react is a 0.x package. Under semver, ^0.575.0 means >=0.575.0 <0.576.0, so it will NOT resolve to 0.577.0. The range must be explicitly bumped.

Changes:
In both files, change `"lucide-react": "^0.575.0"` to `"lucide-react": "^0.577.0"`.
Run `npm install` in the repo root to update the lockfile.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change lucide-react in docs/package.json — that's a separate standalone project.
- lucide-react is in devDependencies in both packages (it's used for icon generation at build time, not bundled at runtime).

userStories.title: Run npm update to resolve all in-range patches and fix open lockfile conflict
userStories.description: Run npm update in the root to pick up all in-range patch bumps (radix, storybook, happy-dom, knip, @types/node 22.19.13→22.19.15). Also run npm install to properly resolve the open@10 lockfile conflict where mcp-server needs open@^11 but the lockfile has 10.x hoisted from storybook.
acceptanceCriteria: npm outdated shows no packages with Current != Wanted (except @types/node which stays at ^22, lefthook which was bumped separately, and lucide-react which was bumped separately)
package-lock.json is updated with latest in-range versions
userStories.notes:
Files:
- package-lock.json (updated by npm update/install)

Context:
Several packages have newer versions within their existing ^ ranges that npm update will resolve:
- @radix-ui/react-visually-hidden: 1.2.3 → 1.2.4 (browser-extension)
- @storybook/addon-a11y, @storybook/react, @storybook/react-vite: 10.2.13 → 10.2.16, storybook: 10.2.15 → 10.2.16 (browser-extension)
- happy-dom: 20.7.0 → 20.8.3 (plugin-sdk dev)
- knip: 5.85.0 → 5.86.0 (root dev)
- @types/node: 22.19.13 → 22.19.15 (root dev)

Additionally, there's a lockfile conflict with `open`: mcp-server/package.json declares `"open": "^11.0.0"` but the lockfile resolved to 10.2.0 because storybook depends on open@^10 which got hoisted. Running `npm install` should create a nested node_modules/open@11 for mcp-server.

Changes:
Run `npm update` in the repo root to pick up all in-range patches.
Then run `npm install` to ensure the lockfile properly resolves the open version conflict.
If open@11 still doesn't install properly for mcp-server, run `npm dedupe` as well.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change any version ranges in package.json files — this story is only about resolving what's already in range.
- Do NOT change @types/node range — it must stay at ^22 (Node 22 LTS target).
- Do NOT touch docs/ or plugins/ — they have separate lockfiles/node_modules.
